## IAM Policy Change

### Description
<!-- What does this policy grant access to? Why is it needed? -->

### Affected Service(s)
<!-- e.g. S3, EC2, DynamoDB -->

### Principal (who/what will use this policy)
<!-- e.g. Lambda function, EC2 instance role, Developer team -->

### Least Privilege Checklist

- [ ] Actions are scoped to the minimum required (no wildcards like `s3:*`)
- [ ] Resources are scoped to specific ARNs, not `"*"`
- [ ] Conditions are added where applicable (e.g. MFA, IP range, tags)
- [ ] No `NotAction` or `NotResource` used
- [ ] Policy has been tested in a non-prod environment
- [ ] Ticket/justification link provided below

### Justification / Ticket
<!-- Link to Jira, GitHub issue, or short explanation -->
